description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a flat roof and a mix of white and greenish exterior surfaces. The front facade includes a large garage door, a prominent entryway with stone steps, and a small arrangement of decorative rocks. The structure is composed of several interlocking box-like volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. Windows are placed asymmetrically, with some large horizontal openings and others more subtle, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The use of stone, wood, and metal accents further enhances the modern architectural style.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, white and greenish walls, a large garage, and a stone entryway with steps and decorative rocks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered, boxy structure and the rear portion of the house with minimal window openings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, large garage door, stone steps, and decorative rocks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the elongated form, horizontal window, and the side of the entry steps.
description_view_3: Rear view with mostly solid white surfaces and minimal architectural detailing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide stone steps, a recessed door, and decorative rocks; no porch or columns.
